name: Peter's Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients thoroughly.
2. Form the mixture into four patties.
3. Broil or grill to taste.
Nutritional information per serving: 231 calories (39% from fat), protein 26.6 g, fat 9.8 g (polyunsaturated 0.5 g, monounsaturated 4.5 g, saturated 3.4 g), carbs 7.8 g, fiber 1.2 g, cholesterol 116 mg, iron 3.2 mg, sodium 1160 mg, calcium 41 mg.
